subject: Re-run v2-S03 (a) P1/P4/P6/C5 with sz pinned per subject
description: Now that v2-S02 PASSED 6/6, re-run sub-stage (a) with the iter-7 sz_peak pinned (replaces v1's free-sz centroid ICP). Compare to LP-only (sz free) bench_a_results.csv to isolate the sz-pin lift, especially on 788406 where LP's depth-ratio sz_init=3.60 was 28% high vs GT=2.82.
